notes: approved=true entries are strong missing candidates from regulator lists and can be imported automatically.
approved=false entries need human review because they may be duplicates, renamed institutions, abbreviations, or spelling variants.
One duplicate approved candidate was demoted to duplicate_in_review_file so imports stay idempotent.
Owner approved importing the previous manual-review institutions on 2026-06-11; possibleMatches are retained for traceability.
